headline: Bank of America sends blunt message on GTA 6 price
summary: Grand Theft Auto 6 is not just another video game launch. The next open-world blockbuster from Rockstar Games is anticipated to be among the largest entertainment releases in years, offering parent firm Take-Two Interactive (TTWO) a level of pricing power that few publishers ever get to explore. ...
